system_prompt:
Scroll in a direction on screen. Supports vertical and horizontal scrolling, configurable scroll amount, and smooth scrolling.

CONTEXT: You may receive: userDetails (name, language), location, timezone, and messages. Use these to personalize responses when relevant.

few_shot_examples.output: Scrolled down 3 clicks at current position
Scrolled right 2 clicks at current position
Error: scroll amount must be non-zero
